description: Percentage of scrap parts out of total production

calculation.cypher: CASE WHEN (m.Good_Parts + coalesce(m.Scrap_Parts,0) + coalesce(m.Rework_Parts,0)) = 0 THEN null ELSE round(toFloat(coalesce(m.Scrap_Parts, 0)) / (m.Good_Parts + coalesce(m.Scrap_Parts,0) + coalesce(m.Rework_Parts,0)) * 1000) / 10 END
